seo.title: Wink Pricing | Free to Use. 5.5% on Confirmed Bookings.
seo.metaDescription: Free to set up. Free to use. Pay 5.5% all-in on confirmed bookings, Stripe gateway included. 10% default to partners. WinkSocial: subscription tiers.
seo.ogTitle: Wink Pricing | Free to Use. Pay When Bookings Convert.
seo.ogDescription: No setup fee, no monthly fee on the core platform, and 5.5% all-in on confirmed direct bookings.

fields.body: Free to set up. Free to use. Pay 5.5% all-in on confirmed bookings, Stripe gateway included. 10% default to partners. WinkSocial: subscription tiers.

cards.title: Hotel-owned demand
cards.body: Bookings driven from the hotel website, hotel WinkLinks, Studio outputs, or WinkSocial posts. Includes Stripe gateway.

cards.title: Partner demand
cards.body: Bookings driven through Network partners such as creators, agencies, super apps, banks, DMCs, event organizers, communities, and other travel-demand Partners.

cards.title: Consumer channel
cards.body: Consumer marketplace bookings on book.wink.travel. Auto-active when the hotel joins Wink, with control to toggle off any time.

cards.title: Hotel setup
cards.body: Property profile, room and content setup, rates and inventory configuration, promotions, sales channels, and Booking Engine configuration.

cards.title: Booking Engine
cards.body: Stripe-powered checkout for rooms, packages, F&B, spa, experiences, and add-ons.

cards.title: WinkLinks
cards.body: Bookable storefronts for hotels and Partners, using live hotel cards and direct checkout paths.

cards.title: Studio
cards.body: Social Links and Web Components that turn content, websites, newsletters, QR codes, and partner campaigns into bookable demand.

cards.title: Network
cards.body: Partner distribution layer with hotel-controlled rules, rates, commission, restrictions, and attribution.

cards.title: Traveliko
cards.body: Wink-operated consumer channel layer that hotels can activate, price, package, and control.

items.question: How much does a direct booking cost?
items.answer: A direct booking costs 5.5% all-in on confirmed booking value, with Stripe included. The hotel keeps 94.5% before taxes, refunds, chargebacks, and hotel-side operating costs.

items.question: Is there a setup fee or monthly fee?
items.answer: No. The core Wink platform is free to set up and free to use. Wink earns when booking value is created.

items.question: Who pays the partner commission?
items.answer: The hotel pays the partner commission. The default 10% partner commission is paid by the hotel on top of the 5.5% platform fee, so a Partner-driven booking carries a 15.5% all-in cost to the hotel under the default model.

items.question: How is Traveliko priced?
items.answer: Traveliko bookings use the same 5.5% all-in pricing as direct bookings. Hotels can activate or deactivate the channel and control the rates, perks, and packages they want to show.

items.question: Does WinkSocial cost extra?
items.answer: Yes. WinkSocial is the AI content engine and has a subscription layer because it uses AI compute. Bookings generated through WinkSocial-paired Social Links still follow the standard booking fee.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
